title: Blade Design System – UI Framework & Components by Razorpay
content: Blade from Directories: Components: Blade Design System is a comprehensive toolkit designed to streamline the creation of cohesive and user-friendly digital experiences across Razopay platform. Blade offers a rich array of design guidelines, components, and tools. Design System empowers designers and developers to craft interfaces that seamlessly integrate with Razopay's brand identity while prioritizing accessibility and responsiveness. Component status Elevation Figma Repository Motion Responsive Spacing Styles Theming Typography Accordion Alert banner Badges Bottom sheet Breadcrumb Button Button group Cards Checkbox Chip Data table Divider Drawer Dropdown Icon Link List Modal Popover Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Snackbar Switch Tabs Tag Text area Text field Tooltip
